# Shurden's Roofing

> Family-owned roofing contractor based in Maben, Mississippi. GAF Master Elite® certified. Residential roof replacements, commercial roofing systems, storm damage repair, and insurance claim support across North Mississippi since 2015.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Shurden's Roofing services, certifications, and service area in North Mississippi.
- [Services](/services): Residential roofing, commercial systems (SBS, GAF Liberty, Mule-Hide TPO, metal), storm damage repair, and insurance claim help.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Before/after photos of completed roofing projects across North Mississippi.
- [About & Reviews](/reviews): Family team, company history, and customer reviews.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone 662-498-6629, free roof inspection request form, and FAQ.
- [Service Areas](/service-areas): Index of all North Mississippi cities served.

## Service Areas

- [Roofing in Starkville, MS](/roofing/starkville-ms): GAF Master Elite roofer for Starkville and Oktibbeha County.
- [Roofing in Columbus, MS](/roofing/columbus-ms): Residential and commercial roofing for Columbus and Lowndes County.
- [Roofing in West Point, MS](/roofing/west-point-ms): Roofing for West Point and Clay County, including ag and metal roofs.
- [Roofing in Tupelo, MS](/roofing/tupelo-ms): Storm damage and insurance claim specialists for Tupelo and Lee County.
- [Roofing in Louisville, MS](/roofing/louisville-ms): Residential and commercial roofing for Louisville and Winston County.
- [Roofing in Eupora, MS](/roofing/eupora-ms): Local roofer for Eupora and Webster County.
- [Roofing in Maben, MS](/roofing/maben-ms): Our home base — roofing for Maben since 2015.
- [Roofing in Ackerman, MS](/roofing/ackerman-ms): Roofing for Ackerman and Choctaw County.
- [Roofing in Oxford, MS](/roofing/oxford-ms): Roofing for Oxford and Lafayette County.
